'''Ilic''' was the capital city of [[New Cov/Legends|New Cov]]. It was built under a dome to protect the inhabitants from carnivorous plants.

==History==
Ilic was routinely pillaged by raiders (rumored to be sponsored by either the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] or the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]]) for their biomolecular products as a form of taxation.

During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], New Cov's capital, Illic, was the place of meeting between members of [[Garm Bel Iblis's movement]] and [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] sympathizers of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. Rebel leader [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] ran a phantom company named [[Amethyst Shipping & Storage]] in Ilic to supply his secret base ''[[Peregrine's Nest]]''.<ref name="DFR">''[[Dark Force Rising]]''</ref>

[[File:Stormtroopers_Ilic.jpg|thumb|left|200px|[[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] in Ilic.]]
During the [[Thrawn campaign]], another Imperial [[Raid on New Cov|raid]] in Illic revealed clearly the connexions between Bothans and Bel Iblis. In fact, two [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Officer/Legends|officers]] were present this time: [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]]. Bel Iblis stopped to use Illic and New Cov after they convinced him to join the new Republic.<ref name="DFR" />
